categories.name: Platform Reliability & Outages
categories.description: Calls addressing system downtime, service degradation, incident response, root cause analysis, post-incident remediation, and post-incident customer communication (explaining outage impact, providing incident documentation, confirming recovery). Includes both customer-facing discussions and internal engineering reviews of reliability issues. (Merged from two originally-proposed categories -- 'Platform Reliability & Outages' and 'Post-Incident Customer Communication' -- since the second was really a downstream stage of the same topic rather than a distinct theme; the bonus insights notebook's incident_stage field already captures that stage-level distinction for anyone who needs it.)

categories.name: Renewal Risk & Churn Prevention
categories.description: Calls where contract renewal is at risk due to product issues, competitive evaluation, or customer dissatisfaction. Includes account recovery efforts and discussions of conditions required to retain the customer.

categories.name: Billing & Licensing Issues
categories.description: Calls addressing invoice discrepancies, overage charges, proration errors, seat count mismatches, license upgrade billing problems, and usage/capacity overages that drive billing impact. Typically requires finance team involvement or billing adjustments. (Folded the originally-proposed 'Usage & Capacity Management' category in here -- it only had 2 supporting examples and its own description was framed entirely around billing impact of usage overages, making it a sub-case of this category rather than a distinct theme.)

categories.name: Compliance & Audit Preparation
categories.description: Calls focused on regulatory compliance frameworks (SOC 2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, HIPAA), audit readiness, evidence collection automation, and compliance reporting capabilities. Often involves the Comply module.

categories.name: New Customer Onboarding & Implementation
categories.description: Initial deployment planning, technical setup, timeline discussions, and kickoff calls for new customers or new module rollouts. Includes migration planning and integration scoping.

categories.name: Integration & Technical Configuration
categories.description: Calls addressing third-party integrations (Okta, PagerDuty, LogVault), API usage, SCIM provisioning, SSO setup, and technical configuration challenges. Includes both troubleshooting and implementation planning.

categories.name: Feature Gaps & Roadmap Requests
categories.description: Calls where customers request features not yet available, discuss product roadmap timing, or need workarounds for missing functionality. Often results in feature request logging and account manager escalation.

categories.name: Positive Renewal & Expansion
categories.description: Healthy renewal discussions, annual reviews with satisfied customers, and upsell/cross-sell opportunities. Customers express satisfaction and interest in expanding usage or adding modules. (Kept separate from 'Renewal Risk & Churn Prevention' despite both being renewal-stage calls, because they call for opposite actions from an account team -- one needs intervention, the other doesn't -- which is exactly the kind of distinction a sales/CS leader would want preserved rather than collapsed.)

categories.name: Internal Sprint & Development Planning
categories.description: Internal engineering team calls covering sprint planning, retrospectives, story point estimation, technical debt, and development capacity allocation. Includes architectural design discussions and backlog prioritization.

categories.name: Cross-Functional Business Reviews
categories.description: Internal all-hands or leadership calls reviewing company-wide metrics, product launch timelines, customer success updates, competitive losses, and strategic priority setting across departments.
